result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) <> TRIM(newvalue__c)
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, oldvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) <> TRIM(newvalue__c)
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, oldvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-11'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) <> TRIM(newvalue__c)
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, oldvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-11 00:00:00'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    oldvalue__c AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) <> TRIM(newvalue__c)
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, oldvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT
    caseid__c AS case_id,
    createddate,
    oldvalue__c,
    newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-11 00:00:00'
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM assignments;

args.query: SELECT MIN(createddate) AS min_cd, MAX(createddate) AS max_cd FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner';

exec_args.sql: SELECT MIN(createddate) AS min_cd, MAX(createddate) AS max_cd FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c='Owner';

args.query: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT field__c, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY field__c ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         oldvalue__c,
         newvalue__c
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-11 00:00:00'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT oldvalue__c AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(oldvalue__c) <> TRIM(newvalue__c)
  GROUP BY oldvalue__c
), handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM (
    SELECT case_id, oldvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT case_id, newvalue__c AS agent_id FROM assignments WHERE newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
  ) x
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
